claim: Continue.dev's hybrid retrieval (LanceDB + ripgrep + LLM rerank, all local) outperforms pure vector RAG by >=10 points on a code-context Q&A workload, with privacy-clean local-only execution. Spec v0.3 row 25.
source_for_claim: Continue.dev production telemetry + open-source design docs. Spec v0.3 row 25: 'Continue.dev hybrid stack as production blueprint for code context.'
comparison_anchor: retrieval/pure-vector-rag-baseline (LanceDB only, no ripgrep, no rerank)
decision_rule: If CONFIRMED, lift hybrid stack as v1 code-context blueprint; row 25 lock holds. If REFUTED on the gap (still better but <10pp), repomap may be the better v1 default. If REFUTED below baseline, hybrid is overengineered for OCM's small-model setup.
blocked_on: LanceDB embedding pipeline not yet wired in OCM
MCP code-aware tool layer not yet wired
